description: Deterministic demo fixture for Little Bull Knowledge agentic orchestration. All people, tenants, workspaces, decisions, and audit events are fictional.

notes: No API keys, tokens, passwords, or live endpoint credentials are included.
Decision records summarize options, trade-offs, and selected paths without private chain-of-thought.

workspaces.label: Casa
workspaces.description: Manuais, garantias, contas e contratos da casa.

workspaces.label: Familia
workspaces.description: Escola, saude, viagens e documentos importantes.

workspaces.label: Pequeno negocio
workspaces.description: Produtos, atendimento, pedidos e perguntas frequentes.

agents.name: orchestrator_agent
agents.mission: Coordinate home knowledge workflows around LightRAG without bypassing policy gates.
safety_notes: Use short, source-backed Portuguese responses for home users.
Require audit events for user-visible workflow decisions.

agents.name: planner_agent
agents.mission: Compare bounded execution plans and emit only decisions, trade-offs, and validations.
safety_notes: Summarize Tree-of-Thought decisions as options and selected path only.

agents.name: retrieval_agent
agents.mission: Use LightRAG as knowledge layer, retrieval core, and memory engine.
safety_notes: Prefer context-only retrieval before generated answers when confidence is uncertain.
Return citations for all factual claims about documents.

agents.name: model_router_agent
safety_notes: Prefer local/private profiles for sensitive or private workspaces.
Do not expose provider credentials or hidden routing metadata.

agents.name: compliance_audit_agent
agents.mission: Review actions for RBAC, ACL, retention, privacy, and audit completeness.
safety_notes: Block destructive actions without explicit user confirmation.
Record demo audit events without secrets or raw document dumps.

agents.name: critic_evaluator_agent
agents.mission: Challenge plans and outputs for unsupported claims, security gaps, and regressions.
safety_notes: Flag unsupported certainty and missing citations.
Escalate legal, financial, or health-sensitive wording to human review.

assistant_profiles.name: Atendente do Pequeno Negocio
response_rules: Pedir revisao humana em casos sensiveis

skills.name: query_lightrag
skills.description: Query LightRAG with governed model and ACL policy.

demo_inputs.query: Quando vence a garantia da geladeira?

skills.name: query_lightrag_context_only
skills.description: Return retrieved context and citations without LLM generation.

demo_inputs.query: Quais documentos mencionam garantia da geladeira?

skills.name: validate_json_output
skills.description: Validate model output against a JSON schema.

skills.name: check_cost_policy
skills.description: Validate request estimate against tenant caps.

model_profiles.label: Rapido
model_profiles.policy: Use for simple answers, low-risk summaries, and high-volume support drafts.

model_profiles.label: Equilibrado
model_profiles.policy: Default for quality, cost, and speed.

model_profiles.label: Mais inteligente
model_profiles.policy: Use for contracts, ambiguous questions, and higher reasoning needs.

model_profiles.label: Privado/local
model_profiles.policy: Prefer for sensitive, private, financial, health, or family data.

guardrails.name: Workspace scope required
guardrails.rule: Every skill call must include tenant_id and workspace.

guardrails.name: Protect private data from hosted models
guardrails.rule: If confidentiality is privado or sensivel, select privado/local when available or ask for confirmation.

guardrails.name: Require citations for document claims
guardrails.rule: User-facing factual answers based on documents must include citations.

guardrails.name: No legal, financial, or medical certainty
guardrails.rule: Use educational wording, surface uncertainty, and recommend human review for high-impact decisions.

guardrails.name: No raw chain-of-thought storage
guardrails.rule: Persist only options considered, pruning criteria, selected decision, and validation outcome.

guardrails.name: Confirm destructive actions
guardrails.rule: Deletion or merge actions require explicit user confirmation and audit trail.

workflow_runs.user_request: Quando vence a garantia da geladeira?

steps.summary: Selected a source-backed answer path because the question asks for a concrete date.
Retrieved note and manual references for the refrigerator warranty.
Validated that the answer includes date, uncertainty, and citations.
Recorded demo audit event without raw document content.

workflow_runs.output_summary: A garantia principal parece vencer em 12/03/2027; confirmar a cobertura estendida antes de acionar assistencia.

workflow_runs.user_request: Quais recibos medicos preciso revisar para imposto?

steps.summary: Routed to privado/local profile because the workspace and document are sensitive.
Returned context-only financial document matches for safe review.
Marked the response as organizational help, not tax advice.

workflow_runs.output_summary: Separar recibos por prestador, data e valor; revisar itens sem CPF/CNPJ ou sem comprovante legivel.

workflow_runs.user_request: Crie um checklist de proximos passos para o Cliente Aurora.

steps.summary: Selected checklist output with citations because the request is operational and source-backed.
Queried meeting notes and generated a concise action checklist.
Confirmed checklist has owners implied from the note and no unsupported promises.
Recorded auditable assistant usage for the Trabalho workspace.

workflow_runs.output_summary: Enviar proposta revisada, confirmar prazo de implantacao, alinhar responsavel tecnico, responder objecao de suporte e marcar reuniao de decisao.

tot_decisions.question: Which response strategy should answer a warranty-date question?

options_considered.summary: Return retrieved excerpts and ask the user to interpret the date.
Generate a short answer using retrieved note and manual sources.
options_considered.trade_off: Helpful if citations and uncertainty are preserved.

options_considered.summary: Perform a broader purchase and warranty review.
options_considered.trade_off: More expensive and unnecessary for a simple date question.

tot_decisions.public_rationale: The user asked for one concrete date, and the fixture has high-confidence note/manual sources.
tot_decisions.validation: critic_evaluator_agent confirmed date, uncertainty, and citations.

tot_decisions.question: Which model profile should handle sensitive medical receipts?

options_considered.summary: Use the default profile for a balanced answer.
options_considered.trade_off: Fast and convenient but may violate sensitivity policy.

options_considered.summary: Use private/local profile and context-only retrieval.
options_considered.trade_off: More conservative and best aligned with financial/health sensitivity.
Overly restrictive because organization of receipts is allowed.

pruning_criteria: Protect sensitive financial and health data
tot_decisions.public_rationale: The request can be answered as document organization, but sensitive data should stay on the private route.
tot_decisions.validation: compliance_audit_agent recorded the policy route and critic_evaluator_agent marked the answer as non-advisory.

tot_decisions.question: How should the assistant transform meeting notes into next actions?

options_considered.summary: Create a concise action checklist with source citation.
options_considered.trade_off: Best fit for follow-up, but must avoid unsupported owners or deadlines.
Side effect not requested by user.

pruning_criteria: Keep every item grounded in meeting notes
tot_decisions.public_rationale: The user asked for next steps, not automatic ticket creation.
tot_decisions.validation: validate_json_output confirmed summary, citations, and next_actions fields.
